continuation_rule.description: Allows offensive players to finish steps/pivots after contact if dribble is gathered.
continuation_rule.logic_adjustment: Increases expected field goal percentage for driving teams; slight boost to offensive efficiency in high-contact matchups.

orb_density.description: High offensive rebounding rates as a volatility buffer.
orb_density.logic_adjustment: Teams with ORB% > 35% receive a 'Second Chance' multiplier in simulation loops.

luck_regression.logic: Teams with extreme positive luck (> 0.05) are penalized in early rounds; teams with negative luck (< -0.05) receive a 'Grit' boost if defensive efficiency is top 30.

coach_tournament_moxie.description: Coaches with Elite Eight+ experience are the strongest single predictor for Final Four appearances. Mark Few leads at ~83% career tournament win rate.
coach_tournament_moxie.threshold: 20+ career tournament wins = elite tier (normalized to 1.0)

tempo_upset_strategy.description: Underdogs who intentionally play slow tempo (outside top 100 KenPom AdjT) compress the talent gap. Successful Cinderellas rank outside the top 100 in tempo.
tempo_upset_strategy.threshold: Avg pace < 65.0 triggers neutralization bonus for the lower seed
tempo_upset_strategy.source: Reddit: Seven pre-tournament stats correlated with NCAA success

roster_continuity.description: Top-performing 2025 teams average ~60% returning minutes. Teams with <40% returning minutes are high-risk for early exits.

championship_formula_2025.description: Statistical profile for deep runs in 2025

underseed_vulnerability.impact: Increases upset probability by 15% if opponent is high-Moxie.
